summary: Added bloom postprocessing pass: (1) Added enableBloom, bloomStrength, bloomThreshold, bloomRadius to QualityProfile — low tier disabled (all zeros), medium tier moderate (0.8/0.6/0.4), high tier strong (1.2/0.4/0.6). (2) Implemented src/visual/composer.ts with initComposer (returns EffectComposer+UnrealBloomPass or null when bloom disabled) and resizeComposer helper. (3) Updated renderLoop.ts to accept optional composer in LoopDeps and use composer.render() when present, falling back to renderer.render(). (4) Updated resize.ts to accept optional composer and call composer.setSize on resize. (5) Integrated composer into main.ts after quality resolution. All 23 tests pass, TypeScript and production build clean.
